ogTitle: Blampied vs Blind Bight: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blampied and Blind Bight.
heading: Blampied vs Blind Bight — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blampied, Victoria and Blind Bight, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blind Bight has a lower overall climate risk score (41/100) compared to Blampied (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blampied or Blind Bight safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blampied has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Blind Bight scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blampied scores 58/100 for bushfire risk. Blind Bight scores 29/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blampied or Blind Bight?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blind Bight has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.82% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
